# Llanos Basin

**Summary**: A major sedimentary basin in Colombia known for gas and oil production.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-baarimah|BAARIMAH, 2012]] used data from the Llanos basin to model reservoir behavior.

## Geological and Structural Setting

## Key Findings From This Location

- The study used a rich gas condensate fluid from the Cusiana Field in this basin. ([[2012-baarimah|BAARIMAH, 2012, p. 52]])
